perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink camisole, sits in front of a camera in an indoor setting. She has a subtle pouting expression and looks slightly down. (2) She begins to speak directly to the camera, her expressions shifting between thoughtful, slightly expectant, and then smiling. (3) She leans in closer to the camera towards the end, maintaining eye contact and a playful expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice speaks in Mandarin with a soft, conversational tone. There is slight indoor ambient noise. (2) The speaking continues as she delivers a setup. (3) As the punchline is delivered, a brief sound effect of a laughter track plays, and the audio ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "最近呢 有一個煩惱" (Recently, I have a trouble) - Functional text with a neutral/sad tone. (2) "就是... 我想和男朋友 去看電影" (is... I want to go to the movies with my boyfriend) accompanied by movie title stickers like "封神?", "哪吒?", "射雕?", "美國隊長?" and a popcorn emoji. (3) "所以我想問你們 有什麼男朋友 可以介紹一下" (So I want to ask you, any boyfriends you can introduce?) - Functional text with a humorous tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character is visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long straight dark hair, wearing a pink spaghetti-strap camisole and a silver necklace with a small pendant.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain indoor room with a light-colored wall and a visible white door frame in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous short clip designed for social media engagement. The creator uses a play on words where she initially seems to be asking for movie recommendations to watch with a boyfriend, but the twist reveals she is actually asking for a boyfriend recommendation instead.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product or service is being promoted.
